mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, b.book_title, b.cover_image AS book_cover, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orderitem WHERE order_id = o.order_id ) AS book_count FROM orders o JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id WHERE o.member_idx = #{member_idx} GROUP BY o.order_id, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, b.book_title, b.cover_image ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
